title: Peja, Peja — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Peja, Peja: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Peja is a city in Peja with a population of 48,000. A city in western Kosovo at the foot of the Rugova Mountains, known for the Patriarchate of Peć, the Bajrakli Mosque, and the nearby Rugova Canyon.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
